leadText: Islespy Shore (Japanese: しまなみ浜 Islescape Shore) is an area located in the northern region of the Cobalt Coastlands of Hisui. It is located to the east of Spring Path and north of Veilstone Cape and Windbreak Stand.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Islespy Shore is the northernmost shore of the Cobalt Coastlands. It is shaped like a crescent. A steep cliff overlooks the water at the northern end by the mountain. It extends out to a small lake within a forest near the Spring Path.

sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] This section is incomplete. Please feel free to edit this section to add missing information and complete it.
